🤖 AI Agents and Agentic AI are often used interchangeably — but they are NOT the same.
Understanding the difference is becoming critical for businesses, developers, and tech leaders in 2026.
In my latest blog, I break down:
🔹 What AI Agents actually do
🔹 What makes Agentic AI different
🔹 Key differences in autonomy, decision-making & adaptability
🔹 Real-world examples and business applications
🔹 Why this distinction matters for the future of automation
A simple way to think about it:
➡️ AI Agents = Task Executors
➡️ Agentic AI = Goal-Oriented Decision Makers
As AI evolves from simple assistants to autonomous systems, knowing this difference can help organizations build smarter and more scalable AI solutions.
